name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Be specific.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Affected Component

- [ ] Backend — Agent Pipeline (agents.py / graph.py)
- [ ] Backend — LLM Integration (llm.py)
- [ ] Backend — Market Data / Tools (tools.py)
- [ ] Backend — Compliance Engine
- [ ] Frontend — Dashboard / Chat
- [ ] Frontend — 3D Visualization
- [ ] Frontend — Charts
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, references, etc.
